task_description: Power up MK OS by wiring orphaned modules, killing dead main() functions, securing the Telegram token, adding a persistent Telegram daemon loop, bulking up knowledge, adding tests, and handling the GENERATE route gracefully.

verification.summary: Build succeeds (11 warnings, all cosmetic). All 7 tests pass with 62 assertions. Tests exercise real code paths: graph queries, reasoning inference, router accuracy, deep reasoner, composer output, vector search, and embeddings. Review v2 approved with no blocking issues.
